---
title: "nested_sampling"
---

Simple testing of Nested Sampling (NS) routines on some syntetic data

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/nested_sampling.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/nested_sampling.py)
:::


*No public definitions found in this module.*
